name: Wilson–Davis Notes
summary: A disputed set of notes dated October 16, 2002 and attributed to Eric Davis, describing an alleged conversation with retired Vice Admiral Thomas Wilson about a purported privately managed UAP retrieval and reverse-engineering program. Wilson has denied the account, and the document’s claims remain unverified. The notes were entered into the record of a May 2022 House UAP hearing.

relationships.context: Notes are attributed to Eric Davis; their claims remain disputed and unverified
Entered into the hearing record in May 2022
Document describes an alleged retrieval and reverse-engineering program
Frequently cited in debate over congressional access and hidden programs

externalLinkLabel: Read the document entered into the House hearing record

primarySourceLinks.label: Document entered into the May 17, 2022 House hearing record
